news.title: 克林顿夫妇就爱泼斯坦案作证视频曝光，希拉里因照片泄露愤然离席
news.title0: Leaked photo, hot tub, and Pizzagate - video of Clintons' testimony on Epstein ties released
news.content: 克林顿夫妇就与爱泼斯坦关系接受国会质询的视频公布。希拉里因作证照片被泄露一度愤然离席，两人均否认事先知晓爱泼斯坦罪行。
news.content0: Hillary Clinton nearly stormed out of her closed-door testimony to US lawmakers about Jeffrey Epstein after a photo of her from the deposition was leaked, newly released video footage shows.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国首相斯塔默公开反对特朗普对伊政策，称不认同“从天而降的政权更迭”
news.title0: Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet
news.content: 英国首相斯塔默明确表示，不认同美以对伊朗的袭击，称英国政府“不相信从天而降的政权更迭”，这是他与特朗普迄今最重大的分歧。
news.content0: For the best part of 48 hours, first the defence secretary and then the foreign secretary were struggling to cogently articulate in public what the government made of the US and Israel's attacks on Iran and why.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普主持联合国安理会会议，关注冲突中的儿童教育
news.title0: Melania Trump chairs UN Security Council meeting on children in conflict amid Iran strikes
news.content: 美国第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普主持联合国安理会会议，讨论冲突中的儿童与教育问题，并向阵亡美军家属表示哀悼。
news.content0: First Lady Melania Trump presided over a United Nations Security Council meeting on children and education in conflict in New York on Monday, as the US continues its military action in Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗袭击致六名美军士兵在科威特身亡，死亡人数翻倍
news.title0: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
news.content: 美国确认，伊朗对科威特一处军事设施的袭击已导致六名美军士兵死亡，死亡人数较最初报告翻倍。
news.content0: Six American soldiers were killed in an Iranian strike against a military facility in Kuwait on Sunday, the US has confirmed.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国富豪因反犹情绪申请德国护照，称英国对犹太人“充满敌意”
news.title0: One of UK's richest men wants German citizenship over 'hostility' to Jews
news.content: 英国亿万富翁迈克尔·莫里茨爵士称英国对犹太人“充满敌意”，正申请德国护照作为“保险政策”，并警告AI将对白领工作造成巨大冲击。
news.content0: "Britain is an uncomfortable place for Jews today," Cardiff-born billionaire Sir Michael Moritz has said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 加拿大总理卡尼访澳，推动“中等强国”战略以应对全球变局
news.title0: Carney to push his middle power strategy during Australia visit
news.content: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼访问澳大利亚，将在议会发表演讲，推动“中等强国”联合战略，以应对大国经济“胁迫”，深化双边合作。
news.content0: Prime Minister Mark Carney has touched down on Tuesday in Sydney, Australia — the next stop on his Indo-Pacific tour aimed at shoring up investment in Canada and building new trade alliances.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 演员大奖红毯星光璀璨，众星诠释复古主题造型
news.title0: The most striking looks from the Actor Awards red carpet
news.content: 演员大奖（原演员工会奖）红毯举行，首次设定“重塑1920-30年代好莱坞魅力”着装主题，众星以流苏、珠饰等元素致敬爵士时代。
news.content0: The Screen Actors Guild Awards returned on Sunday evening, complete with anew name— and, for the first time ever, a thematic dress code.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 苹果推出低价iPhone 17e，起售价599美元以提振销量
news.title0: Apple launches cheaper iPhone 17e in push to boost iPhone sales
news.content: 苹果发布起售价599美元的iPhone 17e，采用单摄像头、较小屏幕等精简配置，旨在通过更平价机型提振iPhone整体销量。
news.content0: Apple announced Monday a lower-priced version of the iPhone 17, expanding its smartphone lineup as it relies on its blockbuster product to stave off concerns the company is falling behind in artificial intelligence.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 尼日利亚军方被指行动迟缓，致村庄遭袭约200人丧生
news.title0: The Deadly Cost of the Nigerian Military’s Inaction
news.content: 尼日利亚村庄遭博科圣地武装分子袭击，约200人遇害。幸存者称，军方在袭击结束10小时后才抵达，行动迟缓代价惨重。
news.content0: On a January evening in Woro, a village in Nigeria, a man approached Umar Bio Salihu, the village chief, and handed him a crudely torn piece of paper from an exercise book.
news.author: NYTimes
